content:
SCRIPT 1 — Amul Butter (Pongal)
[SCENE: A grandmother's kitchen, early morning. Smell of rice pongal fills the air.]
Grandma: (smiling) 'Pongal ready-ah?'
Granddaughter: 'Haan Paati, but something missing...'
[She opens fridge, takes out Amul butter. A golden dollop melts into the pongal.]
Granddaughter: 'Ippo perfect!'
VO: Amul — India ki shaan, har ghar ki jaan.
[Logo on screen with a Pongal motif]

SCRIPT 2 — Jio (Diwali)
[SCENE: Small town family video calling their son in Mumbai. Low internet keeps freezing.]
Mother: 'Beta... beta can you hear us?'
[Son switches to Jio. Crystal clear video.]
Family: (gasps) 'Wah!'
Father: (laughs) 'Ab Diwali poori hogi!'
VO: Jio — Ab poora India connected. Har dil roshan.
[Fireworks transition to Jio logo]

SCRIPT 3 — Swiggy (Office Lunch)
[SCENE: Corporate office, 1pm. Everyone stressed, no time for lunch.]
Employee 1: 'Canteen band hai aaj...'
Employee 2: (opens Swiggy) '10 minutes mein aa jayega!'
[Food arrives perfectly. Team gathers around, laughs return.]
VO: Swiggy — Because every lunch break deserves a real break.
[Logo with delivery icon]

VISUAL CONCEPT — Tanishq (Wedding)
HEADLINE: 'Har sapne ko asli sona do'
LAYOUT: Split image — left shows a bride's hands, right shows a mother's hands holding the same necklace 20 years apart
IMAGERY: Warm golden hour light, traditional south Indian temple wedding backdrop, jasmine flowers
COLOR STORY: Deep maroon, antique gold, ivory white
TYPOGRAPHY: Serif gold headline, whisper subtitle in Hindi

VISUAL CONCEPT — Parle-G (Monsoon)
HEADLINE: 'Baarish mein wahi purana pyaar'
LAYOUT: Top-down view of a window with rain streaks, a cup of chai and Parle-G biscuits on the sill
IMAGERY: Blurred greens outside window, steam rising from chai, biscuit mid-dip
COLOR STORY: Muted greys, warm amber, Parle-G yellow
TYPOGRAPHY: Handwritten feel, nostalgic

VISUAL CONCEPT — Fevicol (Festival)
HEADLINE: 'Yeh rishta kabhi nahi tootega'
LAYOUT: A cracked old photo being held together by two sets of hands — grandparent and grandchild
IMAGERY: Aged sepia photo, warm hands, soft natural light, old home background
COLOR STORY: Sepia tones with a single bright Fevicol orange accent
TYPOGRAPHY: Classic bold Hindi headline, minimal English tagline

JINGLE — Tata Tea (Morning)
LYRICS:
Uth ja India, naya din aaya
Tata Tea ki khushbu laaya
Ek pyali mein, ek nayi shuruaat
Jaago re, jaago re India
MOOD: Energetic, hopeful, patriotic
INSTRUMENTS: Dhol, flute, acoustic guitar, tabla
ARRANGEMENT: Starts soft with flute, builds to full ensemble at chorus

JINGLE — Dairy Milk (Diwali)
LYRICS:
Mitha mitha pyaar, meethi Diwali
Khushiyon ki hai yeh rangoli
Har rishta roshan, har dil mitha
Cadbury ke saath, yeh Diwali bhi
MOOD: Warm, celebratory, family-focused
INSTRUMENTS: Piano, strings, light percussion, children's choir
ARRANGEMENT: Gentle opening, warm mid-section, big chorus finish

CAMPAIGN — Flipkart Big Billion Days
KEY MESSAGE: 'India ka apna biggest sale'
TARGET AUDIENCE INSIGHT: Price-conscious middle-class buyers who research online but trust Indian brands
CONTENT PILLARS: Value deals, local seller stories, regional language ads, countdown excitement
WEEKLY PLAN:
Week 1: Teaser — Kuch bada aane wala hai across Instagram/YouTube
Week 2: Influencer unboxings + vernacular ads (Tamil/Telugu/Bengali)
Week 3: LIVE SALE — WhatsApp deals, push notifications, flash sales
Week 4: Thank you India closing campaign, UGC contest
CHANNEL STRATEGY: YouTube pre-rolls, Instagram reels, WhatsApp Business broadcasts, Hotstar ads
KPIs: 2Cr+ reach, 15% CTR on deals, 40% repeat buyers

CAMPAIGN — boAt Audio (Youth)
KEY MESSAGE: 'Apni sound, apni identity'
TARGET AUDIENCE INSIGHT: Gen Z Indians who use music as self-expression and brand as identity
CONTENT PILLARS: Music culture, street fashion, campus life, artist collabs
WEEKLY PLAN:
Week 1: 'What's your sound?' Instagram filter + challenge
Week 2: College campus influencers + Spotify playlist takeover
Week 3: Limited edition drop announcement, YouTube mini-doc
Week 4: User-generated 'My boAt Story' contest
CHANNEL STRATEGY: Instagram Reels primary, YouTube Shorts, Spotify audio ads, college activations
KPIs: 5M reel views, 50K contest entries, 25% sales lift among 18-24
